headline: Crown Castle Q1 AFFO & Sales Beat Estimates Despite DISH Headwinds
summary: CCI beats Q1 AFFO and revenue estimates despite DISH-related headwinds, as leasing trends hold steady and strategic restructuring and asset sales plans stay on track.

raw.headline: Crown Castle Q1 AFFO & Sales Beat Estimates Despite DISH Headwinds
raw.summary: CCI beats Q1 AFFO and revenue estimates despite DISH-related headwinds, as leasing trends hold steady and strategic restructuring and asset sales plans stay on track.

headline: Keybanc Maintains Overweight on Crown Castle, Raises Price Target to $105
summary: Keybanc  analyst Brandon Nispel   maintains Crown Castle (NYSE:CCI) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $98 to $105.

raw.headline: Keybanc Maintains Overweight on Crown Castle, Raises Price Target to $105

headline: Crown Castle Inc (CCI) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Highlights: Strategic Moves and Financial Outlook
summary: Crown Castle Inc (CCI) reports solid Q1 results, outlines strategic focus on tower business, and addresses challenges with DISH Network.
